summary: Comprehensive testing completed for GuessIt football prediction platform. All backend APIs working perfectly (9/9 tests passed). Frontend UI components fully functional including homepage, auth pages, navigation, and admin access. No critical issues found - application working as expected for freshly cloned project.
passed_tests: Backend: Error handling for invalid endpoints and credentials
Frontend: Homepage loads with header, promo banner, match tabs, league filters
Frontend: Login page functional with email/password and Google OAuth
Frontend: Register page functional with validation and requirements
Frontend: Admin login page accessible at /itguess/admin/login
Frontend: Navigation links working (How It Works, Leaderboard, About Us, News, Contact)
Frontend: Loading screens and transitions working properly
Frontend: Responsive design and consistent branding
